reference_paths.name: chapter3_original
reference_paths.rationale: Faithful chapter-3 12-position reconstruction with [10,10,80] split per node.

candidates.name: repair_A_more_pre_static_on_late_Z_block
candidates.rationale: Keep all 12 nodes unchanged; only move more dwell before nodes 10-11 ([10,30,60]) so the late Z-driven block is less post-heavy.

candidates.name: repair_B_break_late_Z_plus_pair_by_flipping_node11
candidates.rationale: Flip node 11 only to break the late same-sign Z-pair without changing node count or total time.

candidates.name: repair_C_flip_node10_to_add_late_minusY
candidates.rationale: Flip node 10 only so the late +Y revisit becomes -Y, directly targeting the observed +Y overexposure / -Y underexposure while keeping 12 nodes and 1200 s.

overall_conclusion: no tested minimal repair narrows the gap meaningfully; the faithful 12-node skeleton remains far worse than default18 under baseline low noise.
